summary: Design a technical platform that can understand tender documents, evaluate eligibility of bidders based on given criteria, and produce explainable evaluation reports for government procurement.
key_steps: Reading and organizing tender eligibility conditions
Handling bidder documents in various formats
Matching bidder information against tender criteria
Providing clear verdicts and manual review flags for each criterion
Recording the decision trail as the official audit record
optimization_claims: Nobody is silently rejected if system is not sure
Specific mechanisms for handling real-world issues
constraints_addressed: Consistently evaluating eligibility without missing anything
